{{Infobox concept
| name = Skysworn
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Skysworn Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Skysworn are a group of [[sacred artists]] serving the [[Blackflame Empire]], acting as an imperial police force and wandering judges. Tasked with preserving justice and upholding the rule of law, they possess the authority to punish criminals and maintain peace within the [[sacred arts]] world. Their role includes investigating negligence, taking individuals into custody in [[the Emperor]]'s name, and managing threats such as dangerous spirits. While they generally avoid minor clan disputes to prevent imperial intervention, they can command combat-capable [[sacred artists]] to report for inspection or transfer during times of war. The organization is headquartered at [[Starsweep Tower]], located within [[Stormrock]], a massive cloud fortress that functions more like a floating city than a traditional ship. Members of the Skysworn are often identified by their green armor or robes, and they utilize Thousand-Mile Clouds for travel. The group maintains a hierarchical structure involving various ranks, such as Truegolds and Lowgolds, and emphasizes competition among its members to prepare the next generation of protectors. Historically, the Skysworn have been a prestigious path for independent [[sacred artists]], and even the current [[Emperor]] previously served within their ranks.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Skysworn]] do not intervene in petty clan squabbles.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Skysworn]] are a group that [[Cassias]] believes will not allow certain actions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Skysworn]] are currently investigating the [[Arelius family]] for negligence due to anonymous reports.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Skysworn]] are a group that [[Renfei]] belongs to.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Skysworn are an elite sect of [[sacred artists]] within the [[Blackflame Empire]] who serve [[the Emperor]] as protectors dedicated to preserving justice and the rule of law. Clad in green plate armor, these warriors guard an outer door and maintain a city that houses students and a [[Soulsmith]] [[library]]. After transporting individuals to their mountain via a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], the group may use jumping techniques to take people. While they hold ceremonies to welcome trainees, the Skysworn maintain a dislike for Blackflames and have been used as part of [[Eithan]]'s plan to incriminate [[Jai Daishou]]. During recent conflicts, the group engaged in [[sword]]-to-[[sword]] combat with [[Redmoon Hall]] and observed [[Lindon]] after his departure from [[Serpent's Grave]], potentially viewing him and [[Yerin]] as targets for capture.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] brought [[Lindon]] to his current location directly after leaving [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are keeping [[Lindon]] under observation rather than arresting him.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] wear green plate armor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] used a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to carry people to the mountain.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] is a sect within the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Skysworn]] is a group/rank.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are a group of warriors who guard the outer door.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]]'s plan was to get [[Jai Daishou]] to incriminate himself in front of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] have arrived.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are a group of [[sacred artists]] dedicated to preserving justice and the rule of law.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] will jump to take people.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] serve the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are going [[sword]]-to-[[sword]] with [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are an elite group.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] have a city.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] is a group that [[Eithan]] is attempting to influence by linking Underlords to them.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are a group that has students and a [[Soulsmith]] [[library]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] are protectors who serve [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Skysworn]] trainees are welcomed in a ceremony.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] do not like Blackflames very much.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] struggled onto his cloud, kneeling on it and flying over to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] may consider [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] to be wanted for capture.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Empowered by the [[Empire]] to act as wandering judges, the Skysworn are a group of authority figures who recognize Enkai's defense of the town. After [[Eithan]] leaves [[Lindon]] and his companions in their care, the group responds to reports of a disturbance near the facility and provides [[Lindon]] with the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]. During their interactions with the group, they hold [[Yerin]] back from a portal but eventually begin working alongside her. The Skysworn arrive with [[dragons]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]], and while they maintain a level of autonomy where no additional authority is granted over them, [[Lindon]] eventually serves on one of their squads.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are wandering judges empowered by the [[Empire]] to punish criminals.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are a group that recognizes Enkai's defense of the town.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|An apprentice [[Skysworn]] stood alone in the midst of black flames.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are a group that [[Eithan]] left [[Lindon]] and his companions with.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are responding to reports of a disturbance around the facility.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] lent [[Lindon]] the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] held [[Yerin]] back from passing through the portal.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are working with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] will ask for [[Lindon]]'s permission to speak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[dragons]] came from the [[Blackflame Empire]] with the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] mentions the [[Skysworn]] and their [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] serves on a [[Skysworn squad]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] wants to join the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn]] are a group over which no additional authority is to be granted.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Skysworn is an organization of warriors, consisting of trainees and Truegolds who utilize [[Striker techniques]]. Operating from their flying city known as [[Stormrock]], these agents wear green armor and maintain a presence throughout the [[Empire]]. While they provide scouting missions and patrol the borders of the [[Blackflame Empire]], the group has also been responsible for devastating [[Eithan]]'s partners. During recent conflicts, small squads of the organization caught up to [[Lindon]]'s group as they faced an attack that triggered a distress signal. Despite these challenges, the Skysworn managed to escape, and [[Lindon]] remains able to send them messages via his communication construct.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] are an organization with agents throughout the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] include Truegolds and trainees.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] use [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn]] are a group of people on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] are a group mentioned by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn]] are warriors who wear green armor and possess [[Truegold]] souls.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] possess a flying city called [[Stormrock]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn]] uses identical rooms in the tower for various purposes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] devastated [[Eithan]]'s partners.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] wears [[emerald]] [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has been doing missions for the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There are small [[Skysworn]] squads present.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] have caught up to [[Lindon]]'s group.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] patrol the border of the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s territory.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn]] are under attack.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Skysworn]] distress signal was being received.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] got away.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] provide scouting missions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn]] have better rooms than trainees.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can send messages to the [[Skysworn]] using his communication construct.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Stormrock]] is a [[Skysworn]] city.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Captain Naru Gwei]] sees to the leadership of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] worked for the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Skysworn]] are a group coordinating the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s forces.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“We are responding to reports of a disturbance around this facility after the passage of the Bleeding Phoenix.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“And under no circumstances will you be granted any additional authority over the Skysworn.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Shame. It's such a shame that I am duty-bound to the scouting mission the Skysworn have given me. I can't possibly help you.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
